$meta.purpose: Annual realized return and inflation data for historical-backtesting cohort tests (Track C of VALIDATION_WORKPLAN.md). Designed to feed a historical-replay return generator added in step 13.
$meta.schema: Each row in `years` is one calendar year. Values are decimal fractions (e.g., 0.12 = +12%). `sp500TotalReturn` is price + reinvested dividends. `bond10yTotalReturn` is 10-year Treasury total return. `cash3mYield` is realized 3-month T-bill yield. `cpiInflation` is December-over-December headline CPI change.
canonicalSources: Shiller US Stock Markets 1871-Present (http://www.econ.yale.edu/~shiller/data/ie_data.xls) — S&P 500 total return and CPI.
Damodaran historical risk premia (https://pages.stern.nyu.edu/~adamodar/) — alternate S&P and bond data.
FRED DGS10, TB3MS, CPIAUCSL — Treasury and inflation series.
Robert Shiller's long-run data set — monthly CPI, combine to annual.
$meta.status: SAMPLE ONLY — representative cohort years populated for structural validation. Full 1928–present dataset must be sourced and merged before step 15 cohort outcome tests produce meaningful results. Treat values below as best-effort historical approximations; numbers may differ 0.1–1pp from definitive sources.
$meta.coverageNote: Includes cohort-kickoff years for the canonical retiree fixtures planned in step 14: 1929 (crash), 1937 (second crash), 1966 (worst 4%-SWR historical window), 1973 (stagflation), 1982 (best-ever start), 2000 (dot-com), 2008 (GFC). One year before and one year after each cohort year is included so a short warm-up / verification is possible.

assetClassProxies.sp500TotalReturn: SPX price return + dividends reinvested. Shiller or Morningstar SBBI.
assetClassProxies.cash3mYield: Realized one-year yield on 3-month T-bills rolled quarterly.
